creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 206647
libgit2.diff

0.28.2 and 0.28.3 have a bunch of bug, security, and reliability
fixes.

The ABI has been stable according to ABI Laboratory with no soname bump,
so PORTREVISION bumps of dependent ports should not be necessary.

Builds fine in Poudriere on 11.2/i386, 12.0/amd64, 13.0/amd64

Changes:	https://github.com/libgit2/libgit2/releases
ABI:		https://abi-laboratory.pro/tracker/timeline/libgit2/
